arts.ttl: Why Leeds United are ready to trust Karl Darlow vs Luton Town after Illan Meslier decision
arts.sum: Leeds United manager Daniel Farke shocked supporters on Thursday when he announced that first choice goalkeeper Illan Meslier will be dropped for the trip to Luton Town in the Championship. Meslier made two mistakes last weekend which cost Leeds a victory over Swansea City and in his press conference, Farke announced that he had made the decision to drop the goalkeeper.

arts.ttl: Leeds United's smart transfer masterplan explained as FFP reality clear
arts.sum: "“This was always going to be a challenging set of financials given it covers a period the season Leeds were back in the Championship," Powell explained. Leeds United's accounts were released earlier this week showing a £60.8m loss for the 2023/24 season.

arts.ttl: Sheffield-born ref confirmed for Luton v Leeds United
arts.sum: Any believers of EFL conspiracies might be concerned at the background of Bramall, given that he’s a Sheffield-born referee that is never to be involved in games for either of the Steel City’s clubs, United or Wednesday. With Leeds United embroiled in a promotion clash with Chris Wilder’s Sheffield United, the last thing Whites fans want to see is a refereeing appointment with a potential conflict of interest.

arts.ttl: Leeds United predicted XI vs Luton Town as Ramazani and Gnonto decisions made
arts.sum: Tanaka also started the Swansea game on the bench for the same reasons as Firpo, before coming on to give away the initial corner which led to the first equaliser. Daniel James came close several times against Swansea and will likely keep his place, as will club top scorer Joel Piroe, who has yet to net in five games.

arts.ttl: Illan Meslier's future at Leeds United may be decided by teammate during run-in
arts.sum: Replacement Karl Darlow has played just three cup games for United this season, keeping only one clean sheet - against League Two Harrogate Town. Is that rust something he can shake off for the final seven games, having not played in the league all season?

arts.ttl: Leeds United predicted XI to face Luton Town
arts.sum: Leeds United travel down to Luton Town this weekend looking to get back to winning ways, with Daniel Farke already confirming one key lineup decision. Leeds United team news pre-Luton: Darlow to start, no fresh injuries

arts.ttl: Raphinha swaps shirts with ex-Leeds United target De Paul
arts.sum: Leeds United could have had a star-studded Premier League lineup if some of their transfer links had materialised, adding to their incredible signing of Raphinha . Raphinha on deadline day for £17million was the pick of the bunch, but he could have been joined at Elland Road by then-Udinese star Rodrigo De Paul, who was heavily linked and had even gone to the lengths of teasing a possible transfer in response to The Square Ball.
